mapper.insert: insert into dms_registration (patient_id, create_time, end_attendance, status, skd_id, need_book, bind_status, dept_id, attendance_date, patient_age_str) values (#{patientId}, #{createTime}, #{endAttendance}, #{status}, #{skdId}, #{needBook}, #{bindStatus}, #{deptId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{patientAgeStr})
mapper.select: select id, patient_id as patientId, create_time as createTime, end_attendance as endAttendance, status, skd_id as skdId, need_book as needBook, bind_status as bindStatus, dept_id as deptId, attendance_date as attendanceDate, patient_age_str as patientAgeStr from dms_registration where id = #{id}

select count(1) from dms_registration dr left join pms_patient p on dr.patient_id = p.id
and (p.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.medical_record_no like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: update dms_registration set bind_status = 1 where id = #{id} and status = 1 and (bind_status is null or bind_status = 0)
update dms_registration set bind_status = 0 where id = #{id} and bind_status = 1

update dms_registration
dept_id = #{deptId},
skd_id = #{skdId},
attendance_date = #{attendanceDate},
where id = #{id}
